On this page

Tutorials ​

Welcome to the Yeast tutorials! These hands-on labs will teach you how to use Yeast step by step.

Prerequisites ​

Before starting the tutorials, make sure you have:

  • Yeast installed (yeast --version)
  • KVM support enabled (yeast doctor)
  • SSH key configured
  • Basic command line knowledge

Tutorial Map ​

Fundamentals ​

Start here to learn the basics:

#TutorialDifficultyTimeWhat You'll Learn
01First VMBeginner15 minCreate, start, SSH, stop, destroy
02ProvisioningBeginner20 minInstall packages, copy files, run commands
03SnapshotsBeginner20 minTake and restore snapshots
04Multi-VM LabIntermediate30 minMultiple VMs with private networking

Advanced ​

Build on the fundamentals:

#TutorialDifficultyTimeWhat You'll Learn
05Guest ControlIntermediate20 minexec, copy, logs, inspect
06LabsBackery LabIntermediate45 minCybersecurity lab environment
07TemplatesIntermediate25 minBuilt-in and custom templates
08JSON AutomationIntermediate30 minJSON output and event streams

Project Labs ​

Complex, real-world projects:

#TutorialDifficultyTimeWhat You'll Learn
09Nodi Home LabAdvanced60 min4-VM service architecture
10Load BalancerAdvanced45 minCaddy reverse proxy
11Database + AppAdvanced50 minPostgreSQL + Node.js API
12Monitoring StackAdvanced50 minPrometheus + Grafana
13WireGuard VPNAdvanced50 minEncrypted VPN tunnels
14GitOps/CIAdvanced50 minGitea + Drone CI pipeline

How to Use Tutorials ​

  1. Start with Fundamentals - Complete tutorials 01-04 first
  2. Follow the Steps - Each tutorial has step-by-step instructions
  3. Run the Code - Type the commands yourself
  4. Experiment - Try modifying the examples
  5. Check Your Understanding - Review the "What You Learned" section

Getting Help ​

If you get stuck:

  • Check the Troubleshooting page
  • Look at the "Common Failures" section in each tutorial
  • Search GitHub Issues

Next Steps ​

Start with Tutorial 01: First VM to begin your Yeast journey!
